channel.title: Environmental Intelligence — Blog
channel.description: Blog posts from Environmental Intelligence podcast episodes. Daily environmental regulatory and compliance briefing.

item.title: Environmental Intelligence
item.description: Ontario's absence from federal Ring of Fire impact assessment creates immediate regulatory uncertainty for mining proponents in northern Ontario.

item.title: Environmental Intelligence
item.description: No qualifying Canadian regulatory, enforcement, or contaminated-sites developments in today's feeds; focus shifts to practice intelligence and cross-border methane monitoring signals.

item.title: Environmental Intelligence
item.description: Aamjiwnaang First Nation demands full spill details and remediation plan from Suncor following discharge to St. Clair River.

item.title: Environmental Intelligence
item.description: NS enforcement order mandates removal of two unauthorized building storeys, setting precedent for permit compliance in development projects.

item.title: Environmental Intelligence
item.description: Ontario's fast-tracking of Great Bear mine permits under the Mining Act faces Grassy Narrows lawsuit, signaling risks for mining assessments in the province.

item.title: Environmental Intelligence
item.description: BC EAO proposes expedited EA process for major projects, seeking feedback by April 2026 to cut timelines.

item.title: Environmental Intelligence
item.description: BC's proposed FOI amendments could restrict access to EMA and CSR records, requiring immediate advocacy before legislative passage.

item.title: Environmental Intelligence
item.description: New Brunswick's delayed response to Vanier Highway chemical spill highlights gaps in provincial spill protocols under the Clean Environment Act.

item.title: Environmental Intelligence
item.description: Carbon market additionality rules may exclude Indigenous-managed lands in BC and federal jurisdictions, limiting offset eligibility.

item.title: Environmental Intelligence
item.description: BC opens consultation on Koksilah Watershed Plan, requiring input by April 30 for water sustainability compliance under Water Sustainability Act.

item.title: Environmental Intelligence
item.description: New Antarctic meltwater data shows minimal iron release, undermining algae bloom assumptions in global carbon models used for Canadian climate adaptation planning.

item.title: Environmental Intelligence
item.description: Road salt accumulation in Ontario's Lake Simcoe watershed exceeds CCME chloride guidelines, triggering site assessments under O. Reg. 153/04.

item.title: Environmental Intelligence
item.description: Port of Churchill expansion push triggers federal IAA assessments for Manitoba Arctic infrastructure, with oil spill risks under Fisheries Act.

item.title: Environmental Intelligence
item.description: No qualifying environmental regulatory or technical developments reported today.
